creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alexandre C. Guimarães from comment #5)

> 1. port lefthk, this is a separated project now;

I see that but it is still included as a feature:
https://github.com/leftwm/leftwm/tree/main#optional-build-features

I've checked netbsd port and they use:
CARGO_NO_DEFAULT_FEATURES=	YES
CARGO_FEATURES+=		lefthk sys-log

And maybe this is the best and easy way to get a working setup because I only get a blank screen and keys don't work.

> 2. create an ON/OFF option to allow the use of something else, like sxhkd.

I will take a look at it when I figured out how internal letfk works.
Already created config file and no success:
https://github.com/leftwm/lefthk#lefthk

CARGO_FEATURES=  --no-default-features lefthk sys-log

should give a working setup but not lucky here but at least sys-log shows something :)
